summary: Full frontend testing of TECHOS home service platform. All pages load correctly with proper navigation, UI components, and interactions working as expected.

ui_bugs.issue: After sending a message and receiving a reply, the chat area appears mostly empty/blank (messages scroll out of visible area). The chat window could benefit from auto-scroll to latest message.

issues: Two 'Semua' tabs are showing in the filter tabs - likely should be 'Semua' and 'Dibatalkan' or other filter options

action_items: Minor: Auto-scroll Teca chatbot to latest message after response
Minor: Check History page filter tabs - two tabs both labeled 'Semua' appear redundant
critical_code_review_comments: History page shows two tabs both labeled 'Semua' - likely a copy-paste bug where the second tab should have a different label (e.g., 'Selesai' or 'Dibatalkan')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working: Home page (hero, stats, chatbot section, carousel prev/next arrows, Buat Pesanan links), Services page (grid of 9 service cards), Service Detail /services/cctv (problem qty +/- buttons update estimated price, calendar date selection, vehicle selection, property type selection), Schedule page (3 cards, Cancel shows confirmation dialog, confirming removes the item), History page (Selesai/Dibatalkan badges visible), Teca chatbot (suggestion chips clickable, messages sent and simulated response received), Footer newsletter input+Subscribe button present.
rca_of_issues: History page duplicate 'Semua' tabs: likely a development oversight where second tab label was not updated from the default.
